canonical_definition: A GPU-accelerated physics simulation environment for reinforcement learning, used to evaluate performance on nine challenging robotic locomotion and manipulation tasks.
papers: ELEMENTAL: Interactive Learning from Demonstrations and Vision-Language Models for Reward Design in Robotics
R*: Efficient Reward Design via Reward Structure Evolution and Parameter Alignment Optimization with Large Language Models

definitions.text: A physics simulation environment for reinforcement learning, used in this paper to evaluate generated reward functions on robotic manipulation tasks.
